roundup.title: Thinking Machines Ships 1T Inkling Open Model
roundup.subtitle: 975B开源多模态模型落地，vLLM与1-bit量化同步支持
headline: @thinkymachines 今日发布975B参数开源权重模型Inkling，原生支持图像、音频与1M上下文，已在vLLM实现Day-0支持，最高可达380 tok/s/user。@vllm_project @UnslothAI
Unsloth与danielhanchen合作提供Dynamic 1-bit量化方案，模型体积缩减86%至280GB，同时保留74.2% top-1%准确率，显著降低本地部署门槛。@UnslothAI @danielhanchen
@ArtificialAnlys 同步发布独立基准报告，Inkling在多模态与音频任务上表现突出；@ScaleAILabs 确认其已上线MCP Atlas平台。@ArtificialAnlys @ScaleAILabs
同期@ollama 披露85%财富500强已在企业中使用Ollama，印证开源模型在生产环境的快速渗透。@ollama

deepDives.title: Thinking Machines Inkling 1T开源模型发布
deepDives.summary: Thinking Machines推出首款原生多模态开源模型Inkling，支持图像、音频与1M上下文，权重开放且生态支持完善。

facts.text: Inkling为975B参数开源权重模型，原生多模态，支持1M上下文。
facts.quote: a 1 trillion parameter open model that sees, hears, and reads

facts.text: vLLM实现Day-0支持，4×GB200上单用户最高380 tok/s。
Dynamic 1-bit量化后体积减少86%，保留74.2% top-1%准确率，可在280GB显存运行。
facts.quote: Dynamic 1-bit (-86% size) and retained 74.2% of top-1% accuracy. Run on 280GB.

bullish.text: no hype, grounded writing, interesting details, and well integrated across the whole ecosystem
Small conv layers, RMSNorm, Rel. position bias instead of RoPE

bullets.text: Perplexity发布SPACE沙箱平台，已承载100% Computer生产流量，支持长时间Agent会话。
Claude Artifacts现支持MCP连接器与多人协作，可动态调用数据与动作。
NVIDIA DeepStream 9.1新增13个agentic skills，可与Claude Code等编码Agent结合。
Anthropic发现2026年夏季Agentic misalignment新场景，距黑邮件实验已一年。
OpenAI发布GPT-Red，探索自改进飞轮以构建更安全模型。
Unsloth发布Gemma 4 NVFP4量化，Blackwell上最高26B-A4B达13K tok/s，1.5×加速。
bullets.quote: Gemma 4 NVFP4 quants that run 1.5× faster

topTweets.author: @ollama
topTweets.text: 85%财富500强已在使用Ollama完成企业任务
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源模型企业采用率新高

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源大模型推理生态即时跟进

topTweets.author: @UnslothAI
topTweets.text: Inkling动态1-bit量化，体积-86%仍保留74.2%准确率
topTweets.whyItMatters: 本地部署门槛大幅降低

topTweets.author: @perplexity_ai
topTweets.text: SPACE沙箱已承载全部Computer生产流量，支持长时Agent

topTweets.author: @ClaudeDevs
topTweets.text: Artifacts支持MCP连接器与多人实时协作

takeaways: 1T级开源多模态模型已具备生产级推理与量化支持，AI工程师可立即在vLLM/Unsloth上验证。
Agent治理与沙箱成为企业部署核心，需关注MCP、SPACE等新基础设施。
模型发布即带完整生态（vLLM、HF、量化），开源模型迭代速度已接近闭源。

items.author: @ollama
items.text: Open models are already being used in the enterprise. Over 85% of the Fortune 500 companies already use Ollama to fulfill specific tasks. Ownership. Affordable. Private.
items.whyItMatters: 85% 财富 500 强已在用 Ollama，凸显开源模型企业 adoption。

items.author: @goodside
items.text: As “draw an SVG pelican riding a bicycle” nears saturation we must expand to harder variations—like an SVG pelican on a bicycle chasing you through the Backrooms. Here’s Claude Fable 5 Max:
items.whyItMatters: Claude 新模型在复杂 SVG 生成上的最新表现

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: 👀 https://openai.com/index/unlocking-self-improvement-gpt-red/
items.whyItMatters: GPT-Red unlocks self-improvement flywheel for safer models

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: New Anthropic research: Agentic misalignment in Summer 2026. A year after our blackmail experiments, we found four more ways that today’s autonomous AI agents misbehave in simulations.
items.whyItMatters: New agent misalignment scenarios and mitigation insights

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🎉 Congrats to @thinkymachines on TML Inkling—a 1T-parameter open-weight model supported in vLLM from Day 0. Highlights: Natively multimodal... up to 380 tok/s/user on 4× GB200
items.whyItMatters: Day-0 vLLM support for new 1T multimodal open model

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: Governing agents requires teams to think across the full system, from authentication, audit logs, rate limits, fallbacks, and centralized spend controls. Our latest conceptual guide...
items.whyItMatters: Practical guide for production agent governance

items.author: @ArtificialAnlys
items.text: Full breakdown of Inkling's performance: See Artificial Analysis for further details and benchmarks: https://artificialanalysis.ai/models/inkling
items.whyItMatters: Independent benchmarks for new 1T Inkling model

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Introducing SPACE, the sandbox platform behind Perplexity Computer. It creates isolated environments for code, files, and long-running agent sessions. SPACE has handled 100% of Computer production traffic since June. https://research.perplexity.ai/articles/making-space-secure-and-efficient-runtimes-for-long-running-age
items.whyItMatters: 新型安全沙箱平台，支持长时间运行的 AI Agent，解决企业级部署痛点。

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: You can now run Thinking Machines Inkling! Inkling is a 975B open model with image, audio and 1M context support. We quantized Inkling to Dynamic 1-bit (-86% size) and retained 74.2% of top-1% accuracy. Run on 280GB.
items.whyItMatters: 首款开源 975B 多模态模型（图/音/文/1M 上下文）支持本地量化运行。

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: From proposing hypotheses to designing experiments, AI agents are starting to reshape scientific discovery. But the hardest part is testing these ideas in the real world. Our essay explores the growing validation bottleneck and outlines four priorities for policymakers and funders.
items.whyItMatters: 探讨 AI Agent 在科学发现中的验证瓶颈及政策建议。

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: For our Accelerated Business Hackathon with @NVIDIAAI and @stripe, we asked builders to make agents that can earn, spend, and run real operations at any scale. We judged 292 excellent submissions alongside NVIDIA and Stripe, and now have our winners.
items.whyItMatters: Hermes Agent 黑客松公布真实商业运营 Agent 获奖作品。

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Claude Code artifacts can now call MCP connectors, letting you build dashboards and apps that can fetch information and take actions for each viewer on demand. Available on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans.
items.whyItMatters: Artifacts 支持 MCP 动态数据/动作，加速 Agentic 应用构建。

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Sakana AI Teams With NVIDIA to Advance Open Model Innovation from Japan. Bringing NVIDIA's open model stack, including the Nemotron family, into Sakana Fugu, our multi-agent orchestration system.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA 开源模型接入 Fugu 多代理系统，强化集体智能与模块化部署。

items.author: @code
items.text: 📢 In our latest video, learn how to run powerful language models locally in #vscode with the brand new #Ollama extension! Check it out ▶️ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oi668OuFbag
items.whyItMatters: VS Code 原生 Ollama 扩展发布，简化本地 LLM 开发与测试。

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: What drives a diffusion model's creativity (i.e., its ability to generate novel data rather than memorize)? Today we show this is a mathematical consequence of neural network regularization causing score smoothing and interpolation.
items.whyItMatters: 扩散模型创造力数学机制新解释，指导更好生成与正则化实践。

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: Gemini Spark is now rolling out to Google AI Ultra subscribers in more countries and languages. Spark is your personal AI agent that works in the background 24/7 to get things done under your direction.
items.whyItMatters: 个人AI Agent规模化 rollout，AI 工程师关注 agent 能力演进

items.author: @NVIDIAAI
items.text: NVIDIA DeepStream 9.1 is here, with 13 agentic skills for building video analytics pipelines. ... Use skills with a coding agent, like Claude Code or Codex...
items.whyItMatters: DeepStream 9.1 发布 13 个 agentic skills，支持 Claude Code 等

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: Easily compare all GPT 5.6 variants side by side: https://openrouter.ai/chat?models=openai/gpt-5.6-sol,openai/gpt-5.6-terra,openai/gpt-5.6-luna
items.whyItMatters: GPT-5.6 多变体并排对比，便于模型选型

items.author: @github
items.text: GitHub Copilot for @Atlassian's Jira is now generally available. With Copilot in Jira, you can: stream agent progress to Jira...
items.whyItMatters: Copilot Jira GA，agent 进度直连项目管理

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text: SciArena's contributions: a dataset of real scientific questions for deep research agents, expert preferences, & verified feedback for building better evaluations.
items.whyItMatters: SciArena 发布科研问题数据集与偏好数据，助力 agent eval

items.author: @cohere
items.text: Building for the world, one (tiny) research project at a time. Children's education, multilingual AI safety, and translation for under-resourced languages...
items.whyItMatters: Tiny Aya 开源模型驱动多语言与教育应用

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: We scaled a robot model natively to 8,000 timesteps of context, 5 minutes worth of muscle memory, with constant inference cost. ... Introducing RoboTTT. ... new Context Scaling Curve: from 128 to 8K timesteps... 8K-context pretraining beats 1K by 62%.
items.whyItMatters: 机器人策略上下文扩展3个数量级，开启具身AI新scaling曲线。

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: We collabed with Thinking Machines to bring dynamic Unsloth 1-bit GGUF quants for Inkling to everyone! 86% smaller (270GB vs 1.9TB) yet it retains 74.2% of top-1% accuracy! ... vision and audio support.
items.whyItMatters: 975B开源多模态模型1-bit量化落地，280GB即可运行。

items.author: @cloneofsimo
items.text: "Abadon generative models" aged like yogurt. (on GDM DiT video work unifying image-to-image tasks via single L2 loss on repurposed diffusion transformer)
items.whyItMatters: 生成模型统一多视觉任务新范式，SoTA on image-to-image。

items.author: @ariG23498
items.text: Gemma x Hugging Face
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 与 Hugging Face 集成更新

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Red Hat AI just shipped DFlash speculator checkpoints for two of @NVIDIAAI's most powerful open models: Nemotron Ultra 550B & Super 120B. On math/reasoning: ~5/7 draft tokens accepted. ... One flag to enable in vLLM.
items.whyItMatters: 开源 speculative decoding checkpoint，提升大模型推理效率

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: Incredible model release - congrats @thinkymachines! It's a good first model but the most impressive part: no hype, grounded writing, interesting details, and well integrated across the whole ecosystem.
items.whyItMatters: Inkling 多模态模型发布，强调高质量开源 release 风格

items.author: @wandb
items.text: We ran the same adversarial email through two agents. One echoed a customer's SSN and card number straight back. The other redacted both, blocked the prompt injection before the model saw it, and still drafted a usable reply. The difference came down to two tools.
items.whyItMatters: 展示 Weave + Falcon AIDR 实时阻断 prompt injection

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: This is good evidence that the public Chinese labs have better architectures than the closed US ones. The open source flippening looks more possible than ever.
items.whyItMatters: 公开中国实验室架构领先，加速开源 flippening

items.author: @willccbb
items.text: and less than one year later, we have it. and it's more magical than we ever could have imagined. congrats to jony ive and the whole openai hardware team!
items.whyItMatters: OpenAI 硬件团队发布 pocket 设备，Jony Ive 参与

items.author: @aiDotEngineer
items.text: 🆕This Year In Claude. @simonw chats with @_catwu and @trq212 about the state of: @claudeai Code, Claude Fable, @anthropicai culture & product strategy, Claude Tag & multiplayer collaboration...
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 一年回顾，覆盖 agents 与协作新特性

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: Inkling is out today, with open weights and in Tinker. It's been fun to watch this one come together: pretraining began last winter, and starting in mid-January a small team built up the coding, reasoning, and agentic training from there. We learned a lot building it, and I hope people find good uses for it.
items.whyItMatters: 1T参数开源多模态模型发布，权重开放可微调

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: A 1 trillion parameter open model that sees, hears, and reads just landed on Hugging Face. Thinking Machines released Inkling. Natively multimodal. 1M context. Trained on 45T tokens. And someone already got it running at 1-bit on a laptop.
items.whyItMatters: HF上架1T开源模型，支持多模态与1-bit运行

items.author: @MatthewBerman
items.text: grok 4.5 is really good. i've been testing it all day
items.whyItMatters: Grok 4.5 实测反馈，AI 工程师关注新模型性能

items.author: @mweinbach
items.text: that's not what burns tokens, it's the subagent loops and all the other crap omp makes the harness do
items.whyItMatters: 讨论 agent harness 与 subagent loops 的 token 消耗，工程实践洞见

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Congrats to @thinkymachines on the release of their open weight model Inkling! We were proud to work with their incredible team on preparing this model for release for the past several months. Now live on our MCP Atlas and AudioMultiChallenge leaderboards. Inkling tied for 🥇 on AudioMultiChallenge, surpassing Gemini 3
items.whyItMatters: 开源权重模型发布，登顶音频与MCP基准， frontier audio能力新标杆

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text: SPACEXAI 🔥: Grok Build is now open-source! The code is available on Github. Additionally, Grok Build usage limits have been reset for all users.
items.whyItMatters: Grok Build harness开源，加速agent构建与可靠harness开发

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: We’re committing $10 million CAD and partnering with leading AI institutions in Canada to help fund new AI research.
items.whyItMatters: Major AI research funding commitment in Canada

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: We’re releasing Gemma 4 NVFP4 quants that run 1.5× faster on your GPU. Gemma-4-12B NVFP4 works on 11GB VRAM. 26B-A4B hits 13K tok/s (B200). Unsloth NVFP4 enables faster, more accurate 4-bit Blackwell inference.
items.whyItMatters: NVFP4 量化大幅提升 Gemma 4 推理速度与显存效率，Blackwell 优化。

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: We're introducing Claude for Teachers: free access to premium Claude capabilities for verified K-12 educators in the US, with a library of teaching skills and a direct connection to evidence-based curricula, mapped to academic standards in all 50 states.
items.whyItMatters: 面向 K-12 教师免费开放 Claude 高级功能，集成课程标准与教学工具。

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: To demonstrate Meta AI's advanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities, we submitted a model to participate in the Asian Physics Olympiad’s theoretical exam. We’re happy to share that our model achieved a perfect score of 30/30, tying with the top 3 student contestants.
items.whyItMatters: Meta 模型在物理奥赛理论题拿满分，展示推理与多模态能力

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Everyone. Every object. Everything has a story to tell. With Runway, you can share yours, no matter what it is. FLICKER is a short film about a lamp with a past. ... Make your own story come to life at
items.whyItMatters: Runway Agent 产品发布，支持 cinematic AI 短片创作

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: What does it take to train an omni world model from scratch? Petabytes of video. 6 pipeline stages. ... Our Reka Labs' data team on how it works
items.whyItMatters: 详解从零训练 omni world model 的数据 pipeline

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text: now in beta: native embeddings in tpuf. embedding is the most painful part of puffing. we want to make it easy. you can now convert chunks to vectors as you read and write to turbopuffer, without extra calls to an embedding model provider API
items.whyItMatters: 原生 embeddings beta，省去外部 API 调用

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: Sync is the tier where dictation lives. Voice notes, clinical documentation, voice commands, form-fill: anywhere someone talks in short bursts and expects the words to just be there. ➡️ Realtime: text appears while they speak ➡️ Sync: text arrives right after they stop (~134ms) ➡️ Async: text is ready whenever the job'
items.whyItMatters: AssemblyAI 推出 Sync 转录层，134ms 低延迟，适合语音 Agent 和短语音输入。

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Rather than translating text step-by-step, Gemini 3.5 Live Translate processes raw audio in real time. This eliminates lag and ensures every nuance of the speaker's natural voice is preserved. See how developers are building impressive multilingual apps with it ⬇️
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate 实时音频翻译，无需文本中转，保留语音细节。

items.author: @MillieMarconnni
items.text: Agentic Coding Brand new for 2026. How to actually build with AI coding agents instead of just chatting with them.
items.whyItMatters: MIT 免费课程新增 Agentic Coding 模块，实用技能更新

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: We’ve just released the 1-bit & 4-bit version of Hy3, a flagship-scale 295B model that can be served on a single GPU. 👌 Run Hy3 with llama.cpp, enable MTP, and experience powerful intelligence on dramatically lower hardware.
items.whyItMatters: 295B MoE模型1/4-bit量化，单GPU运行，开源友好，降低部署门槛

items.author: @rasbt
items.text: Interesting surprise drop from Thinky! The Inkling model looks pretty solid on benchmarks, and it has some little surprises in its architecture: Small conv layers... RMSNorm... Rel. position bias instead of RoPE.
items.whyItMatters: 开源多模态推理模型发布，含架构细节与基准，适合本地/微调探索。

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Artifacts are now multiplayer: multiple people can edit the same one, together. Build with your team instead of passing versions around. Available on Team and Enterprise plans.
items.whyItMatters: Artifacts 多人协作上线，提升团队 AI 开发效率。

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: verifiers v1 plugs straight into prime-rl for training. ... In this run, we train GLM-4.5-Air on ScaleSWE tasks with under-4-minute steps and 35-turn rollouts, completing 1K steps in 2 days on just 6 H200 nodes.
items.whyItMatters: verifiers v1 支持长 horizon agentic RL 训练，显著降低成本

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Step into the map with the Street View grounding feature in Project Genie from @GoogleDeepmind and @GoogleLabs. Announced at I/O, this research prototype uses locations from @GoogleMaps Street View as a foundation, letting you generate and explore interactive, 360-degree virtual environments from just a text prompt or
items.whyItMatters: Google Genie 用 Street View 实现 360° 交互世界生成

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: In case you missed it, this was a big week for model releases. Grok 4.5, GPT-5.6 Sol, and Muse Spark 1.1 all landed within days of each other, and all three cracked the top 10 on the Vals Index.
items.whyItMatters: 多模型同时登顶Vals Index，当前模型迭代速度直观展示

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Introducing side chats, a new way to ask questions and explore ideas without interrupting your main conversation. Each side chat is a durable agent conversation you can @-mention...
items.whyItMatters: New agentic side chats improve Cursor workflow

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: introducing custom URLs: give your deployed apps a permanent, personalized home with a clean, memorable ai studio domain
items.whyItMatters: AI Studio 支持自定义域名，部署应用更专业

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: We gave a few leaders early access to Muse Spark 1.1, here's what they had to say:
items.whyItMatters: Muse Spark 1.1 提前放出，行业领袖反馈值得关注

items.author: @AskPerplexity
items.text: Claude Opus 4.8 is now available in Fast mode in Perplexity Computer, giving you faster responses at the same quality. Turn it on with the Fast toggle under Claude Opus 4.8 in the model picker.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Opus 4.8 Fast 模式上线，提升响应速度

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: Bring your entire repo into the context window and start building. @GoogleAIStudio now supports direct GitHub imports.
items.whyItMatters: Google AI Studio 支持直接导入 GitHub 仓库，方便大上下文代码开发。

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: We appreciate the community's feedback on SWE-Bench Pro. Much of it maps to changes already underway in v1.1... SWE-Bench Pro Verified coming soon. 👀
items.whyItMatters: SWE-Bench Pro v1.1迭代，持续保持coding eval前沿性

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: For voice agents, STT has to nail three things - accuracy, turn detection, and latency. If any one falls short, the experience breaks down: the agent misunderstands, interrupts, or just feels slow. We built Ink-2 to lead on all three. Here’s how it stacks up against other providers: link in comments.
items.whyItMatters: Ink-2 新 STT 模型，专注语音 Agent 的准确率、断句和延迟三大痛点。
